_comment: SFX mix config for examples/chapter-hud.example.txt. SFX files generated via audiobooker-sfx-gen from text prompts.

ambients._comment: Quiet corridor hum bed under most of the scene. Looped + faded.

oneshots._comment: Light flicker click on the opening line.
Electronic chirp plays during narrator 'visor display pulsed' and finishes just before HUD speaks.
Electronic chirp plays during narrator 'HUD refreshed' and finishes just before HUD speaks.
Hailing chime before Aurora speaks, like a ship intercom announcement.
Electronic chirp plays during narrator 'soft chime sounded' and finishes just before HUD speaks.
